creator: nalitoja@gmail.com
text:
Thomas Schweikle <tps@vr-web.de> writes:

>>Release:        10-CURRENT
[...]
> ===>   Returning to build of gdk-pixbuf-0.22.0_11
> Error: shared library "jpeg.11" does not exist
> *** Error code 1

Read ports/UPDATING for 20110928, you're likely have broken libtool,
i.e. the one without support for shared libs. Try

  $ libtool --features
